name: Athena RPC: uploadFilesToUrls (batch variant)
description: Add the batch variant of the existing uploadFileToUrl method. uploadFilesToUrls takes a list of {fn, url, headers} items and enqueues them all on the device's uploader in one round-trip. Reference: openpilot/system/athena/athenad.py lines 404-448 (../../openpilot/system/athena/athenad.py). The existing CallUploadFileToUrl (methods.go ~line 130) is the single-file version -- mirror its shape for the batch version.
acceptance_criteria: internal/ws/methods.go defines UploadFilesToUrlsParams as a slice of existing UploadFileToUrlParams (each item has fn, url, headers)
CallUploadFilesToUrls(caller, client, items []UploadFileToUrlParams) (map[string]interface{}, error) is added; returns the {enqueued, items, failed} map from the device
RegisterDefaultHandlers installs a device-side stub that returns an enqueued count equal to len(items) and echoes the request shape
internal/ws/methods_test.go covers the batch call with 0, 1, and 3 items
go vet ./... and go build ./... pass cleanly
